project.name: Your Project Name - required, displayed as the main heading
project.lead: Project Lead Name - optional, displayed in the header metadata
project.status: On Track | At Risk | Behind - displayed as a status badge
project.lastUpdated: YYYY-MM-DD - date the report was last updated
project.overallHealth: on-track | at-risk | behind - determines the health indicator color
project.summary: A brief paragraph summarizing the project's current state for executive consumption.

milestones.title: Milestone Name - displayed on the timeline
milestones.status: completed | in-progress | upcoming | at-risk - determines timeline marker color
milestones.description: Brief description of the milestone scope and significance.

shipped.title: Work Item Title - required, displayed as the card heading
shipped.description: Detailed description of what was delivered and its impact.
shipped.category: Category Name - optional, displayed as a tag (e.g., Infrastructure, Security)

inProgress.title: Work Item Title - required, displayed as the card heading
inProgress.description: Description of current work, progress details, and next steps.
inProgress.status: in-progress | at-risk - determines the card's visual treatment
inProgress.category: Category Name - optional, displayed as a tag

carriedOver.title: Work Item Title - required, displayed as the card heading
carriedOver.description: Description including the reason for carryover from the previous period.
carriedOver.category: Category Name - optional, displayed as a tag

currentMonth.overallHealth: on-track | at-risk | behind - determines the health metric color
